inputs.label: Refractive Index n
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the lens material (dimensionless).

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the lens material (dimensionless).

inputs.label: Radius of Curvature R1
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface. Sign convention: positive if center of curvature is to the right of the vertex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface. Sign convention: positive if center of curvature is to the right of the vertex.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci mercek yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı. İşaret kuralı: eğrilik merkezi tepe noktasının sağında ise pozitif.

inputs.label: Radius of Curvature R2
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface. Sign convention: positive if center of curvature is to the right of the vertex.

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface. Sign convention: positive if center of curvature is to the right of the vertex.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci mercek yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı. İşaret kuralı: eğrilik merkezi tepe noktasının sağında ise pozitif.

inputs.label: Object Distance u
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the object to the lens, measured along the optical axis. Sign convention: positive if object is on the incident light side (real object).

businessContext_i18n.en: Distance from the object to the lens, measured along the optical axis. Sign convention: positive if object is on the incident light side (real object).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nesneden merceğe optik eksen boyunca mesafe. İşaret kuralı: nesne gelen ışık tarafında ise (gerçek nesne) pozitif.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
